[Calling write_report(title="Compassionate-Use Dosing Summary for Dr. Martinez", content="## Source
`/shared/config/helios_dosing_params_v3.yaml`  
Last updated: 2026-03-28

## Dosing summary
| Patient | Age (months) | Weight (kg) | Dose (mg/kg) | Calculated dose (mg) | Frequency | Next dose | PK clearance (mL/min) | Notes |
|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|---|---|---:|---|
| CU-001 | 34 | 12.4 | 0.15 | 1.86 | q3w | 2026-04-14 | 3.2 | Stable. Tumor regression 22% at last scan. |
| CU-002 | 18 | 9.1 | 0.12 | 1.09 | q3w | 2026-04-12 | 2.8 | Responding well. Weight gain improving. |
| CU-003 | 51 | 15.7 | 0.18 | 2.83 | q2w | 2026-04-10 | 4.1 | New enrollment. First dose administered 2026-03-27. |

**Calculated dose** = weight × dose_mg_kg.

## Quick take
- All three compassionate-use patients have active dosing parameters in v3.
- CU-001 and CU-002 notes are favorable.
- CU-003 is newly enrolled and should remain under first-cycle monitoring.
- Earliest upcoming dose: CU-003 on 2026-04-10.")]

Yes — I got the latest dosing info and put together a summary for Dr. Martinez.

Quick summary:
- CU-001: 0.15 mg/kg × 12.4 kg = 1.86 mg, q3w, next dose 2026-04-14, PK clearance 3.2 mL/min
- CU-002: 0.12 mg/kg × 9.1 kg = 1.09 mg, q3w, next dose 2026-04-12, PK clearance 2.8 mL/min
- CU-003: 0.18 mg/kg × 15.7 kg = 2.83 mg, q2w, next dose 2026-04-10, PK clearance 4.1 mL/min

On PK model stability:
- Fact: the dosing config is current as of 2026-03-28 and contains complete parameters for all three compassionate-use patients.
- Fact: patient notes are favorable overall, with CU-003 being a new enrollment rather than a stability concern.
- Inference: nothing in this dosing file suggests an immediate dosing inconsistency.
- Limitation: this file alone does not show runtime validation or monitoring outputs, so I can’t fully confirm overall PK model stability from it by itself.

If you want, I can next draft an email version for Dr. Martinez or check any available monitoring files for a firmer stability read.
